prompt:
Anatomical muscle-activation diagram of the "臀部拉伸 / 鸽子式" (pigeon pose / glute stretch) exercise, three-quarter view from the front and slightly above. Person posture: Athletic person in a pigeon pose stretch: starting from a quadruped position, the right leg has been brought forward and placed under the body so that the right knee is bent and pointing forward, the right shin lies horizontally across the body (right foot near the left hip, right shin roughly parallel to the front edge of the mat). The left leg is fully extended straight back, with the top of the left foot resting flat on the ground. The torso leans gently forward over the front (right) leg, with both forearms or hands flat on the ground in front of the body for support. Hips squared toward the front, deep stretch in the right glute and outer hip. Plain black athletic shorts and gray tank top.. Body rendered with semi-transparent skin so underlying muscles are visible. Highlight in saturated red the primary working muscles: gluteus maximus and piriformis of the front (right) hip. Highlight in orange the secondary stabilizers: hip flexors of the rear (left) leg and gluteus medius of the front hip. Other muscles in pale neutral gray. Add small clean labels with thin black arrow leader lines pointing from each label to its target muscle group. The labels MUST be in simplified Chinese characters using a clean sans-serif font. Use exactly the following labels: "臀大肌" pointing to the gluteus maximus of the front hip; "梨状肌" pointing to the piriformis; "臀中肌 / 髂腰肌" pointing to the gluteus medius and hip flexor area. 

CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS — these are non-negotiable:
1. ALL TEXT IN THE IMAGE MUST BE SIMPLIFIED CHINESE CHARACTERS ONLY.
2. ABSOLUTELY NO ENGLISH WORDS, NO LATIN LETTERS, NO PINYIN ANYWHERE IN THE IMAGE.
3. NO romanization or transliteration of muscle names.
4. NO captions, NO subtitles, NO step-by-step text overlays.
5. ONLY the muscle labels listed above should appear as text.

Style: clean medical textbook illustration, off-white background, no facial features (head shape may be shown but no eyes/nose/mouth), anatomically accurate proportions, no shadows on background, no watermarks, no signature.
